subject: Son Goku in his signature gi, mid-stride in a running or forward-charging pose
description: A spiky-haired fighter in an orange and dark-blue gi runs or strides forward with one arm extended. The pose is kinetic and mid-motion, conveying confident forward momentum rather than a full aggressive charge. Speed lines and motion effects suggest fast movement. The card name printed on the frame confirms Son Goku; visually the spiky black hair, orange gi, and characteristic body type align with the well-known character design.
foreground: spiky-haired fighter in orange gi mid-stride, arm extended forward
